summary: Independently verified completion readiness for PLAN-20260710-0004 at the committed CAP-0010 state. All twelve success criteria are satisfied: existing-family instances are dynamically discovered without Python or test inventory changes; new families remain ontology changes; fixture and production invariants are present; normalized projection drift is enforced; relations retain the required GraphRelation-compatible fields; the CLI validates, refuses local collisions, and documents non-transactional allocation; focused tests, the full suite, and audits all pass.
